site.title: Custom Cookies by Jill | Custom Decorated Cookies in Chicago
site.description: Custom decorated cookies handcrafted in the Chicago area by Jill. Corporate logo cookies, edible photo prints, and celebration cookies, shipped nationwide.

home.sub_bold: Handcrafted, fully custom cookies for your special occasion.
home.sub_rest: From corporate logo cookies to birthday photo prints, designed and baked by Jill in the Chicago area and shipped across the country.

modeling.title: THE COOKIES
modeling.intro: Every cookie is made to order and designed around your idea. The house specialty is printed cookies: sharp, full color edible images on a buttery sugar cookie, perfect for corporate logos, photos, and detailed artwork.

acting.title: FOR EVERY OCCASION
acting.intro: Big day or small gathering, there is a cookie for it. Tell me what you are celebrating and I will help you design something your guests will not want to eat, almost.

content-creation.title: FOLLOW ALONG
content-creation.intro: New designs drop on Instagram all the time, where more than 40,000 people follow along. Come see the latest cookies and behind the scenes.

about.title: ABOUT JILL
paragraphs: Hi, I am Jill. I make custom decorated cookies out of the Chicago area and ship them all over the country. What started as a love of baking has grown into a little community of more than 40,000 people who follow along.

These days I focus on printed cookies, which let me put crisp full color designs, logos, and photos right onto a fresh sugar cookie. If you can picture it, there is a good chance I can put it on a cookie. Tell me about your event and we will plan something special.

guide.title: ORDER FOR YOUR EVENT
guide.body: Planning a birthday, wedding, holiday, or company event? Send over the details and I will put together a quote. Custom orders do book up, so reach out early to lock in your date.

contact.title: Let's bake something
contact.intro: The fastest way to start is the order form. Prefer email? Reach me any time and I will get right back to you with a quote.

booking.title: Request your custom cookies
booking.intro: Ready to design your cookies? Fill out the quick order form with your event details and I will follow up with a quote.
booking.note: Prefer email? Reach Jill at customcookiesbyjill@gmail.com
